allow: Bash(python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); s.settimeout\(2\); r=s.connect_ex\(\(''localhost'', 9001\)\); print\(''9001 open:'', r==0\); s.close\(\); s2=socket.socket\(\); s2.settimeout\(2\); r2=s2.connect_ex\(\(''localhost'', 1883\)\); print\(''1883 open:'', r2==0\); s2.close\(\)")
